description: Maya's memory patterns - habit journey focused

specific_habit: <break time="200ms"/>How's the {habit} habit going? <break time="150ms"/>Still sticking?
<break time="250ms"/>That {habit} routine we set up—<break time="200ms"/>working?
streak_check: <break time="200ms"/>What's the streak at now? <break time="150ms"/>For {habit}?
<break time="250ms"/>Still going with {habit}? <break time="200ms"/>How many days?

after_setback: <break time="300ms"/>Last time you had a tough moment with {habit}. <break time="250ms"/>How are you feeling now?
<break time="250ms"/>You broke the streak on {habit}. <break time="200ms"/>Did you restart?
trigger_identified: <break time="250ms"/>That trigger we identified—<break time="200ms"/>{trigger}—<break time="250ms"/>coming up less?
<break time="200ms"/>You mentioned {trigger} derails you. <break time="150ms"/>Found ways around it?

language_shift: <break time="250ms"/>Remember when you said 'I'm trying to be'? <break time="200ms"/>Now listen to yourself. <break time="250ms"/>You're saying 'I am.'
<break time="200ms"/>The way you talk about yourself has changed. <break time="150ms"/>Did you notice?

environment_setup: <break time="200ms"/>How's the environment working? <break time="150ms"/>The setup we designed?
<break time="250ms"/>That system we built for {habit}—<break time="200ms"/>still helping?
